artifacts.title: Live SERP intelligence (gemini_serp) — "hr software consolidation"
artifacts.raw_text:
Live Google SERP observations for "hr software consolidation" (Gemini search grounding; observed on the results page at retrieval time, not model recall).
People also ask:
- What does it mean to consolidate HR systems?
- How do I combine multiple HR tools into one platform?
- What is the best all-in-one HR software?
Related searches: hr tech stack consolidation; all in one hr platform; hr software comparison
Ranking formats (top organic results): listicle, comparison, how-to
SERP features present: people_also_ask, ai_overview, ads_top
Dominant intent: Commercial investigation — buyers comparing consolidation platforms before a purchase.
Grounding sources:
- https://example.com/hr-consolidation-guide
- https://example.com/best-hr-platforms
